overall.description: Gameplay footage from a truck simulator showing a first-person view from inside a semi-truck cabin. The truck drives through a snowy toll booth plaza and onto a multi-lane highway during a heavy snowstorm with reduced visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: toll booth plaza with multiple lanes and overhead gantry

events.description: truck passes through automated toll booth barrier with green light
exiting the toll plaza onto the highway ramp

agents.ego_description: slowly navigating the truck through the toll booth lanes and passing the barrier gates

notable_agents.action: semi-truck ahead clearing the toll booth and moving onto the highway

entered.detail: large overhead metal structure spanning multiple toll lanes with decorative lights
automated barrier arm with green indicator light signaling passage
truck interior dashboard with instrument gauges and GPS navigation screen

segments.scene_description: The truck moves slowly through a snowy toll booth plaza, passing under the overhead gantry and through the automated barrier gates. Snow accumulates on the windshield as the vehicle transitions from the covered plaza onto the highway ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway during heavy snowfall with moderate traffic

events.description: game interface displays cargo job details and destination information on screen
driver checks left side mirror by panning camera left then returns to forward view
truck passes under concrete highway overpass temporarily blocking the sky view

agents.ego_description: accelerating to highway speed and cruising in traffic, overtaking a white truck on the left side

notable_agents.action: white semi-truck being overtaken in the left lane
dark colored truck maintaining distance ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: metal safety barriers along the left shoulder of the highway
concrete bridge structure spanning across the highway lanes
snow-covered ground with sparse trees alongside the highway

segments.scene_description: The truck accelerates onto the open highway, passing guardrails and snow-covered embankments. The driver overtakes a white semi-truck on the left and briefly checks the side mirror. The vehicle passes under a concrete overpass as heavy snow continues to fall, reducing visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway continuing through snowy rural landscape with occasional overpasses

events.description: passing under second highway overpass structure

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady highway speed through heavy snow conditions, following the vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: truck ahead with visible red taillights in the snow

entered.detail: second concrete overpass bridge structure spanning the highway

segments.scene_description: The truck continues cruising on the highway through the persistent snowstorm. The guardrails recede into the distance as the landscape opens up, with snow-covered trees lining the right side. The vehicle passes under a second overpass while maintaining a safe following distance from the truck ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it transitions from a confined toll plaza into a vast, snow-swept highway. It begins by moving slowly under an overhead gantry and through automated barrier gates, with snow accumulating on the windshield as the vehicle leaves the covered plaza. As the truck accelerates onto the open ramp, the scene shifts to a high-speed drive past guardrails and snow-covered embankments, briefly overtaking a white semi-truck before passing under a concrete overpass. The environment then opens up into a persistent snowstorm where the landscape expands to reveal snow-covered trees lining the roadside. Finally, the camera maintains a steady cruise through the heavy snowfall, passing under a second overpass while following the vehicle ahead into the whiteout.
